<!--
  Release Notes Template

  Use this format when writing release notes for GitHub Releases.
  The website changelog parser expects these exact category headings.
  Only include sections that have entries — omit empty sections.

  Keep descriptions user-facing: focus on what changed from the user's
  perspective, not internal implementation details.
-->

## New
- Description of new feature

## Fixed
- Description of bug fix

## Improved
- Description of improvement

## Removed
- Description of removed feature
